name: Fannie Mae Mint Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together margarine and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate syrup. Blend in flour mixture until combined.
4. Pour batter into an ungreased 9x13 inch pan.
5. Bake for 30 minutes or until set.
6. Cool completely on a wire rack.
7. For Topping #1, mix powdered sugar, mint extract, green food coloring, and milk until smooth. Spread over the cooled cake layer.
8. Refrigerate the cake with topping #1 for at least 30 minutes to allow it to set.
9. Melt margarine and chocolate chips together in a microwave or double boiler until smooth.
10. Pour the melted mixture over the chilled cake layer.
11. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
